ab: Niqan kingal tnhiqan mu muyas, Temu ka hangan na, cmhungi bay madas qqiya na kdiyax ka hiya.
ch: 我有一個同學叫Temu，他常常忘記帶東西。
en: I have a classmate named Temu, he often forgets to bring things.

ab: Muyas slhayan cida, knbarux impicu mi ssurus, uxay daw knbarux patas btasun tnhiqan muyas ka hiya.
ch: 上課的時候，他跟同學借鉛筆、橡皮擦或是筆記本。
en: During class, he borrowed pencils, erasers or notebooks from his classmates.

ab: Mntxal, mndha, mnturu, skbarux dha bay qqiya kddiyax ka hiya.
ch: 一次、兩次、三次，大家會借東西給他。
en: Once, twice, three times, everyone would lend him something.

ab: Binaw niqan hari qnnaqah tlluhay na, kiya bay knbarux qqiya daw ini na tbrnahi muway da.
ch: 但是他有個壞習慣，經常借了東西卻不還。
en: But he has a bad habit of often borrowing things but not returning them.

ab: Nhdan bay daw ini kmpkbarux qqiya hiya ka kana dha da.
ch: 最後大家都不想借他東西了。
en: In the end, no one wanted to borrow anything from him.

ab: Niqan kingal diyax, msupu nami musa rmiwaw nganguc ka kana nami.
ch: 有一天，我們大家一起去郊遊。
en: One day, we all went on an outing together.

ab: Mklelu cida, mkmusa san nganguc ka Temu, binaw cmhungi madas cirigami ka hiya.
ch: 路途中，Temu想上廁所，但他忘記帶衛生紙。
en: On the way, Temu wanted to go to the bathroom, but he forgot to bring toilet paper.

ab: Knbarux cirigami tnhiqan muyas ka hiya, binaw cmiyuk rmngaw hiya ka kana dha, ini ku adas uri wah.
ch: 他跟同學借衛生紙，可是大家都回他說，我也沒有帶耶。
en: He borrowed toilet paper from his classmates, but everyone told him that I didn’t bring them either.

ab: Maku lux so mtbiyax lmingis ka Temu da. Msang rmngaw ka hiya, ma ana balay cirigami u ini namu pkbarux knan kana!
ch: Temu急的哭了出來。他生氣的說，為什麼大家都不借我衛生紙!
en: Temu burst into tears. He said angrily, why don’t everyone lend me toilet paper!

ab: Rmngaw hiya ka tnhiqan muyas, alaw su ini adas nanaq ka isu, kiya mi kbrxan su qqiya u, ini su bay tbrnahi muway kana!
ch: 同學告訴他，因為你都不自己帶，而且借給你的東西，你都不會還!
en: The classmate told him, because you didn’t bring it yourself, and you wouldn’t return the things lent to you!

ab: Musa sapah pyasan ka so kusun, tna mrbu balay dhuq sapah pyasan ka Temu da, Temu pa knbrxan na qqiya tnhiqan muyas u, skngalun na pbrinah muway dtnhiqan muyas kana.
ch: 隔天上學，Temu很早就到學校了，Temu把跟同學借的東西都還給同學們。
en: The next day at school, Temu arrived at school early and returned everything he had borrowed from his classmates.

ab: Mquri tnhiqan na muyas msruwa qnquwan na ka Temu, kiya mi rmngaw nxal da u qulung madas nanaq qqiya ka hiya, muda mhuway kana dtnhiqan muyas smruwa pkbarux qqiya hiya uri ka cuxal.
ch: Temu向同學們道歉，並說他以後一定會自己帶東西，也謝謝同學們之前願意借他東西。
en: Temu apologized to the students and said that he would definitely bring his own things in the future, and thanked the classmates for their willingness to lend him things before.
